_comment: Lifecycle email sequence for INBOUND leads (scan form / widget). Hermes `nurture` renders these per lead with a CAN-SPAM footer appended. Load them into your email tool as an automated sequence (it sends on the delays below) — that's the speed-to-lead automation. Placeholders: {first} {biz} {need} {fromName} {company} {websiteUrl} {scanLink} {bookLink}.

steps.bodyTemplate:
Hi {first},

Thanks for reaching out about {biz} — got it. A real person (me) will reply personally within one business day.

While you wait: if you sent a link, I'm already looking for the quickest win. If you didn't, just reply with your website or social and I'll scan it free.

Want to skip ahead and see options now? {bookLink}

steps.subjectTemplate: did you still want that scan, {first}?

steps.bodyTemplate:
Hi {first},

I don't want to clutter your inbox — if now isn't the right time for {biz}, no worries at all, just let me know and I'll stop here.

If you'd still like the free scan, reply anytime and I'll get right on it.
